scope_assets: Zendesk aims to keep its Services safe for everyone and the security of our products & data is of utmost priority.
exclusions: For the initial prioritisation/rating of findings
this program will use the BugCrowd Vulnerability Rating Taxonomy. However
it is important to note that in some cases a vulnerability priority will be modified due to its likelihood or impact. In any instance where an issue is downgraded
detailed explanation will be provided to the researcher - along with the opportunity to appeal
and make a case for a higher priority.
reward_range: The targets within scope are publicly accessible.
last_seen_at: Zendesk aims to keep its Services safe for everyone and the security of our products & data is of utmost priority.
